name: YETI Holdings, Inc.
business: YETI designs, markets, and distributes premium outdoor products including coolers, drinkware, bags, and apparel. It sells through wholesale partners and direct-to-consumer channels globally, targeting outdoor enthusiasts and value-conscious consumers.

exposures.sentence: YETI is a global designer, retailer, and distributor of innovative outdoor products.
We sell our products in our DTC channel to customers on our websites, through YETI Authorized on the Amazon Marketplace, as well as in our retail stores.

We rely significantly on information technology, and any compromise or interruption of that technology resulting from cybersecurity incidents, data security breaches, design defects or system failures could have a material negative impact on our business.
The integration and use of artificial intelligence (AI) in our business presents risks and challenges that could adversely affect our business, reputation, and results of operations.

catalysts.sentence: For 2026, we expect capital expenditures for property and equipment to be between $60.0 million and $70.0 million, primarily to support investments in technology, new product innovation, and our supply chain.
